_comment: Soft distribution targets. See PLAN.md §5. Numbers are tunable here (not in code). Friends' picks (13) are separate and NOT counted in these decade targets.

region._comment: Fraction of general pool per region. Rest is international.

genres._comment: Soft targets only; decade-aware availability handled in code (no Hip Hop in 1950s, Electronic mainly 1980s+, etc.). Unknown-genre well-known tracks are eligible.
